reproducibility: always when getRecommendations runs to success() path
root_cause: Controller called success() helper without importing it.
Unused catch variable violated repo lint rule.
fix_applied: Renamed catch parameter to _ERROR to satisfy lint convention.

root_cause: State setter was declared but never used.

stack: Process exited when Redis was unavailable/misconfigured
reproducibility: always if REDIS_URL is missing or Redis is down
root_cause: Startup catch block called process.exit(1) for Redis connection failures.
fix_applied: Server now logs degraded mode and continues startup when Redis is unavailable.

stack: Error: REDIS_URL is required for production-grade state management.
root_cause: Redis client constructor threw hard error for missing env var.
fix_applied: connectRedis/getRedisClient now return null with warning when REDIS_URL is not set.

stack: Rate limiting middleware propagated Redis connection errors as request failures
reproducibility: always when Redis unavailable and any route is hit
root_cause: Middleware expected connectRedis() to always return a working client.
fix_applied: Middleware now bypasses rate limiting safely when Redis client is unavailable.
